title: N-PAMP draft-00 Finished KAT vector
description: Schema for the N-PAMP draft-00 handshake-binding Finished Known-Answer Test (spec/10 §6.2; RFC 8446 §4.4.4). A standards-anchored, NON-CIRCULAR vector: verify_data = HMAC-SHA256(finished_key, transcript_hash) is computed independently of the implementation under test, and the HMAC-SHA-256 primitive is anchored to RFC 4231 TC1/TC2 fixed inputs — not implementation output bytes.

coverage.description: What this vector anchors and what it explicitly does not cover.

anchored.description: Legs this KAT pins (HMAC primitive vs RFC 4231, oracle leg, impl leg).

not_covered_here.description: Out-of-scope concerns (e.g. finished_key derivation, High/Sovereign SHA-384).

expected.description: Independently computed verify_data MACs (the answers under test).

verify_data_client.description: HMAC-SHA256(finished_key_client, th_ccv); 32-byte MAC as 64 hex chars.

verify_data_server.description: HMAC-SHA256(finished_key_server, th_scv); 32-byte MAC as 64 hex chars.

hash.description: Hash backing the HMAC; this vector is the Standard/SHA-256 leg.

npamp_inputs.description: Fixed inputs the Finished MAC covers: finished_key fixtures and transcript-hash points.

finished_key_client.description: Fixed client finished_key fixture (HMAC key); 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

finished_key_server.description: Fixed server finished_key fixture (HMAC key); 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

th_ccv.description: Transcript hash TH_cCV (client) the client Finished MAC covers; 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

th_scv.description: Transcript hash TH_sCV (server) the server Finished MAC covers; 32 bytes as 64 hex chars.

provenance.description: Why this vector is non-circular: expected MACs come from crypto/hmac directly, not from the implementation's ComputeFinished.

rfc4231_hmac_sha256.description: RFC 4231 §4.2/§4.3 HMAC-SHA-256 test cases that anchor the HMAC primitive.

tc2.description: RFC 4231 Test Case 2 (key="Jefe", data="what do ya want for nothing?").

spec.description: Spec anchor; MUST reference N-PAMP draft-00.
